meta.title: End Behavior of -2x³ + x - 2 | MAT 170 Exam 2

steps.narration: Use the leading coefficient test to find the end behavior of f of x equals negative 2 x cubed plus x minus 2.
steps.label: MAT 170 Exam 2 Review

steps.narration: The leading term is negative 2 x cubed.
The degree is 3, which is odd. That means the ends go in opposite directions.
The leading coefficient is negative 2. Negative with odd degree means: rises left, falls right.
As x goes to negative infinity, f of x goes to positive infinity.
As x goes to positive infinity, f of x goes to negative infinity.
The graph confirms it: rises on the left, falls on the right.
